计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等东南大学优势专业大类在2024–2026年专业热度分析中均为高热推荐或推荐，社会报考热度高；江西省2026 年高考总人数474900人，较2025年（472480人）略有增加，按近年物理类占比约56.4%估算，2026年物理类考生约267844人，竞争略有加剧。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近3年稳定在5100–5500名区间、2026年大幅扩招约12.3%（缓解竞争）、江西省考生总数小幅增加（加剧竞争）、优势学科众多且专业热度高（推高报考热 度）等因素，在2025年基准5438名基础上，预计2026年最低位次约5811名，区间5311–6311名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 2589 → 7625 → 5254 → 5122 → 5438, showing an overall fluctuating and shifting trend. In 2022, due to [reason not specified], the rankings have stabilized in the 5100–5500 range over the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 5438. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jiangxi Province was 76 in 2021, 78 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 75 in 2024, and 81 in 2025. The 2026 plan increases to 91, an expansion of about 12.3% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large increase and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it ranked 15th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable upward trend in recent years (17th in 2021 → 16th in 2022 → 15th in 2023 → 13th in 2024 → 16th in 2025 → 15th in 2026), indicating a very high university level. No related events concerning Southeast University appeared in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation documents; reputation evaluations from 2025 and earlier were somewhat negative (2021 campus safety incident, 2023 teacher ethics incident), but these are earlier events with limited impact on 2026 application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 31st (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting a certain degree of attention. No records of admission cutoff drops were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has 18 disciplines rated A- or above, including 5 A+ disciplines (Transportation Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biomedical Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology), 4 A disciplines (Instrument Science and Technology, Information and Communication Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture), and 9 A- disciplines, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Southeast University's advantageous major categories such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering are all rated as high-heat recommendations or recommendations in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social application enthusiasm. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province college entrance examination is 474,900, a slight increase from 2025 (472,480). Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 56.4%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 267,844, indicating slightly intensified competition.
7. [Regional Factor] Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, and has strong regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Jiangxi Province (91 in physics category in 2026), making it a key source province outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the stable historical rankings in the 5100–5500 range over the past 3 years, a significant enrollment expansion of about 12.3% in 2026 (alleviating competition), a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province (intensifying competition), and numerous advantageous disciplines with high major popularity (driving up application enthusiasm), based on the 2025 baseline of 5438, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5811, with a range of 5311–6311.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wu Jianxiong Class)
- Future Robotics (Future Technology Class)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering, Cyberspace Security)
- Electronic Information (Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Marine Information Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI+ Engineering Innovation Class) (Robotics Engineering, Automation, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Electrical Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Systems)
- Architecture (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Construction and Intelligent Transportation)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Material Science and Ecology) (Materials, Environment, Chemical Engineering, etc.)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Training)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Physics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 5811, range 5311–6311. Candidates near the lower limit of the range (5311) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Wu Jianxiong Class, Computer Science, Electronic Information); candidates in the middle of the range (approximately 5811) are advised to focus on Tier 2 (AI+ Engineering Innovation Class, Smart Energy, Architecture) while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper limit of the range (6311) are advised to use Tier 3 as a safety net (Smart Construction, Material Science and Ecology) and strive for Tier 2. Southeast University has extremely strong engineering strength, many A+ disciplines, and sustained high application enthusiasm.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 733 → 635 → 523 → 553 → 576, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing. After reaching the lowest point of 523 in 2023, it slightly rebounded, stabilizing in the 550–580 range in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 576. The enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Jiangxi Province was 2 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the plan for 2026 increases to 3 students, a 50% expansion compared to 2025. This significant expansion notably alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southeast University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; it ranks 15th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. The university's level is extremely high, which also strongly attracts liberal arts candidates. No incidents related to Southeast University appeared in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation documents; its Douyin popularity ranks 31st (relatively hot), with overall attention moderately high; no records of admission cutoff line drops were found. Southeast University's law discipline is rated A-, and although it does not directly correspond to the liberal arts enrollment major (English), the overall disciplinary strength still attracts liberal arts candidates. The English major corresponds to the foreign language and literature discipline, which is not separately rated at Southeast University.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors are rated as generally watchful in the 2024 major popularity analysis, with stable popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province college entrance examination is 474,900, a slight increase from 2025. Based on the recent history category proportion of approximately 43.6%, the estimated number of history category candidates in 2026 is about 207,056, indicating slightly intensified competition. Southeast University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, and has strong regional appeal to Jiangxi liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that historical rankings have stabilized in the 550–580 range in the last two years, the significant 50% enrollment expansion in 2026 (notably alleviating competition), and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province (slightly intensifying competition), based on the 2025 baseline of 576, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 739, with a range of 650–828.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Southeast University only admits one major, English, for liberal arts (history category) in Jiangxi Province, with an extremely small enrollment (only 3 students in 2026). The predicted ranking is approximately 739, with a range of 650–828. Candidates with rankings near the lower limit (650) have a higher chance of admission; those near the upper limit (828) need to cautiously aim. Due to the very small enrollment, the risk of ranking fluctuation is high. It is recommended that candidates combine other university choices for a stable application.
